findings.message: Typo 'Paper Rview' in Section Guides index; should be 'Paper Review'
Vague quantifier 'clean' used without measurable definition
Vague quantifier 'readable' used without measurable definition
Vague quantifier 'unnecessary' used without a criterion for what qualifies
Vague quantifier 'high-risk' used without a severity rubric or definition
Vague quantifier 'short' used without an item count or length bound
Typo 'Paper Rview' in Section Guides index; should be 'Paper Review' — Line 64 reads: '- Paper review (Paper Rview): `references/paper-review.md`' — 'Rview' is a clear misspelling of 'Review'
Vague quantifier 'clean' used without measurable definition — Line 29: 'Use a clean teaser and pipeline figure.' — 'clean' provides no actionable criterion
Vague quantifier 'readable' used without measurable definition — Line 30: 'Use readable, minimal-ink tables.' — 'readable' provides no actionable criterion
Vague quantifier 'unnecessary' used without a criterion for what qualifies — Line 48: 'remove unnecessary headers before finalizing' — 'unnecessary' is undefined
Vague quantifier 'high-risk' used without a severity rubric or definition — Line 79: 'resolve every high-risk question' — 'high-risk' is not defined in this skill
Vague quantifier 'short' used without an item count or length bound — Line 98: 'A short self-review checklist' — 'short' has no measurable bound
